topics.topic_en: Direct Memory Access (DMA) and Bus Mastering
topics.topic_ar: الوصول المباشر للذاكرة (DMA) والتحكم في الناقل
topics.query_en: Direct Memory Access DMA operating systems explained
topics.query_ar: شرح Direct Memory Access DMA أنظمة التشغيل
topics.reason: Students struggle to visualize how the DMA controller takes over the system bus from the CPU to transfer data directly to memory without CPU intervention.

topics.topic_en: Blocking vs Non-blocking vs Asynchronous I/O
topics.topic_ar: الفرق بين الإدخال والإخراج المحجوز وغير المحجوز وغير المتزامن
topics.query_en: Blocking vs Non-blocking vs Asynchronous I/O operating systems
topics.query_ar: الفرق بين Blocking و Non-blocking و Asynchronous I/O
topics.reason: Differentiating between non-blocking (returning immediately with partial/no data) and asynchronous (notifying the process later when complete) is conceptually confusing.

topics.query_en: Interrupt driven I/O vs Polling operating systems
topics.query_ar: شرح Interrupts vs Polling أنظمة التشغيل
topics.reason: Understanding the exact mechanism of hardware interrupts, interrupt vectors, and context saving requires deep knowledge of low-level CPU architecture.

topics.topic_en: Kernel I/O Subsystem: Buffering, Caching, and Spooling
topics.topic_ar: نظام الإدخال والإخراج في النواة: التخزين المؤقت (Buffering & Caching)
topics.query_en: Kernel I/O subsystem buffering caching spooling OS
topics.query_ar: شرح Kernel I/O subsystem buffering caching
topics.reason: It is difficult to distinguish between the specific use cases of buffering, caching, and spooling, and how the kernel manages memory to optimize I/O performance.

topics.query_en: Lifecycle of an I/O request operating systems
topics.query_ar: دورة حياة I/O request أنظمة التشغيل
topics.reason: Tracing an I/O request requires synthesizing knowledge across all OS layers, from user-space system calls down to hardware device drivers and back.
